description_long: This is a decorative stone bench with a classical design, featuring two robust square end supports adorned with carved floral motifs and topped with ornate finials resembling stylized birds or fleur-de-lis. The seat is supported by a series of short, evenly spaced balusters, giving the bench a balustrade-like appearance. The stone surface is weathered, with visible greenish moss or patina, suggesting long-term outdoor exposure. The bench is solid and heavy, likely carved from a single block or assembled from large stone pieces. Its design is both functional and ornamental, suitable for placement in parks, gardens, or historical urban settings. The overall structure is symmetrical, with the decorative end posts providing both visual interest and armrest functionality.
description: A classical stone bench with ornate end posts, baluster supports, and weathered surface, ideal for outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bench, ornate end posts, and baluster supports.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the end post and the decorative finial on top.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with visible balusters and end post details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the end post and finial.
